name: Cream Sauce for Game Hens- Great Chefs
recipeIngredient: Drippings from game hens (as they are)
recipeInstructions:
1. Reduce the drippings from the hens for 5 minutes over high heat.
2. After five minutes, discard any fat that has risen to the surface of the pan.
3. Add white wine to deglaze the pan and scrape up any browned bits adhering to the pan.
4. Reduce the mixture for an additional minute or two.
5. Add cream, shallots, garlic, and green onions. Cook for 2 more minutes.
6. Remove the pan from the heat.
7. Off the heat, swirl in butter to finish the sauce.
